testcase.name: test_manual_order_at_limit_should_be_403_but_is_201

failure.message: Failed: BUG CONFIRMED: /admin/orders/manual returned 200 instead of 403 when at limit (orders_count=1, max_orders_per_month=1). Missing check_limit call in routes/admin/orders.py create_manual_order().

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter149_license_limits.py:306: in test_manual_order_at_limit_should_be_403_but_is_201 pytest.fail( E Failed: BUG CONFIRMED: /admin/orders/manual returned 200 instead of 403 when at limit (orders_count=1, max_orders_per_month=1). Missing check_limit call in routes/admin/orders.py create_manual_order().

testcase.name: test_manual_subscription_at_limit_should_be_403_but_is_201

failure.message: Failed: BUG CONFIRMED: /admin/subscriptions/manual returned 200 instead of 403 when at limit (subscriptions_count=1, max_subscriptions_per_month=1). Missing check_limit call in routes/admin/subscriptions.py create_manual_subscription().

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter149_license_limits.py:377: in test_manual_subscription_at_limit_should_be_403_but_is_201 pytest.fail( E Failed: BUG CONFIRMED: /admin/subscriptions/manual returned 200 instead of 403 when at limit (subscriptions_count=1, max_subscriptions_per_month=1). Missing check_limit call in routes/admin/subscriptions.py create_manual_subscription().

testcase.name: test_customer_create_below_limit_succeeds
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter149_license_limits.py:455: in test_customer_create_below_limit_succeeds assert r.status_code in (200, 201), ( E AssertionError: Expected 200/201 when below limit, got 500: {"detail":"An internal error occurred. Please try again later."} E assert 500 in (200, 201) E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
